ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (opening entry; PENDING-E15 => CI-only, NO promote/kill verdict).

QUESTION: Does prepending top-k=3 retrieved past corrections to the local watcher scoring context move sentinel AUC, without any training (CIPHER-style in-context baseline)?

INSTRUMENT: incumbent local watcher v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48 (base mlx-community/Qwen3-8B-4bit + LoRA adapter), render_version=2, budget threshold 7.067e-05. Scored via cc_steer.watcher.drafter_mlx.MlxDrafter.nosteer_prob(context_tail) => first-token P(NO_STEER) at answer position. fire = 1 - P(NO_STEER). sentinel AUC = athome.train.gate.sentinel_auc(labels, fire) (re-exported as cc_steer.retrain.promotion.sentinel_auc). VALIDATED: base-arm re-score reproduces eval/probs/v002 byte-identically (diff 0.00e+00 on sampled rows; full-frame assert in run). One local model at a time (MLX watcher only; Voyage is API), clear_cache per row (E12 Jetsam guard), unload at end.

FRAME: frozen watcher_eval.parquet from snapshot _base-20260719 (cloned COW to E22/inputs). n=628, positives=335, negatives=293, digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0. frame.tails = WatcherRow.draft_text (render-v2 flattened tail, the watcher input).

BASE ARM: score frame.tails as-is.

RETRIEVAL ARM: per row, embed tail[-16000:] as Voyage query (voyage-4-large, input_type=query) via cc_steer.exemplars.voyage_embed; MMR-retrieve k=3 from the PREBUILT train-split exemplar index (3153 voyage-4-large vectors already in feedback.db) via cc_steer.exemplars.mmr_select(top_n=32, diversity=0.5); hydrate via exemplars_for; prepend cc_steer.watcher.cascade.exemplar_block under header "=== HOW THIS USER HAS STEERED IN SIMILAR MOMENTS ===" + "=== CURRENT MOMENT ===" marker; re-score with same MLX model.

CONTAMINATION GUARD: exemplar index is train-split only (build_index filters split_of==train); frame_id ∩ index_key overlap = 0 (VERIFIED) => no self-retrieval leakage.

METRIC: delta = auc_retrieval - auc_base. Paired bootstrap 2000 resamples over rows (seed 1729, skip single-class resamples) => 95% percentile CI on delta + per-arm bootstrap CIs.

SUCCESS CRITERION (CI-only): report {auc_base, auc_retrieval, delta, ci95, k=3, frame_n=628} + point estimates and bootstrap CIs. Signal-of-interest: whether the delta 95% CI excludes 0. NO promote/kill verdict (instrument card gates verdicts later).

SPEND: Voyage query embeds only (628 rows x <=4k tokens each, ~2.5M tokens voyage-4-large). Cap $5. No LLM judge. Retrieval index reused (not rebuilt).

ENV: workspace /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-exp1 via `uv run --no-sync --with voyageai` (voyageai absent from workspace venv; layered ephemerally, workspace untouched). Model loaded read-only from live ~/.cc-steer/models. Inputs cloned COW to ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E22/inputs; outputs under E22/out.
